metadata.Plot: Russia is a country where our energy minister is abducted. This task is a risky task and the minister has to be rescued. For this, our country needs the most experienced and talented agents that it produces under the special laboratory conditions. The President, the Prime Minister and the Council of Ministers, apply to the head of intelligence Fahrettin Bey. Fahrettin Bey gives two pure spies, SPP and PP7. Agents accidentally go to Azerbaijan instead of Russia. Opposite the agents are the Russian mafia, Mossad, CIA and Gagarin. The problem is bigger than the state wants.
metadata.Actors: Ufuk Özkan, Metin Zakoglu, Doga Rutkay
